stories.title: Bama, DeBoer reach new 7-year, $87.5M contract
stories.summary: The University of Alabama has reached a new seven-year contract with football coach Kalen DeBoer that will pay him $12.5 million per season through Jan. 31, 2033.

stories.title: Mets finally end skid, but see Lindor (calf) exit
stories.summary: Mets shortstop Francisco Lindor was removed from Wednesday's game against the Twins with left calf tightness after scoring from first base in the fourth inning.

stories.title: Flyers win G3 to push Pens to brink of elimination
stories.summary: Trevor Zegras, Rasmus Ristolainen and Nick Seeler scored three goals on four shots in the second period, pushing the Flyers to the brink of a sweep with a 5-2 Game 3 win against the Penguins.

stories.title: Johnson joins Ginobili as Spurs' Sixth Man winners
stories.summary: Spurs forward Keldon Johnson was named the NBA's Sixth Man of the Year on Wednesday.

stories.title: Silver reaffirms NBA's commitment to Memphis
stories.summary: NBA commissioner Adam Silver reaffirmed the league's commitment to Memphis but added he'd like to see the Grizzlies play occasional games in Nashville in an effort to widen the team's fan base.
